title: Apple Enchant
description: Renewable Enchanted Golden Apple in a vanilla way.
body:
# 🍎 Apple Enchant
**Apple Enchant** is a *vanilla-friendly datapack* that reintroduces **Enchanted Golden Apples** using a fully survival-friendly method.  

---
Enchant a golden apple when you reach level 30, and cook enchanted golden apple to get xp back.

🔗 Compatible with **[Food Balance](https://modrinth.com/datapack/food-balance)** and **[Mooshroom Energy](https://modrinth.com/datapack/energy)** for expanded food mechanics!
## 🔮 How It Works
*"Enchant golden apple"*  
- Players must have **at least 30 experience levels**.
- **Keep crouching** on an **Enchanting Table** to begin enchanting **Golden Apples** in your inventory. 
- The process consumes **1395 XP**, which is the exact amount needed to go from level 0 to 30.

> ⚠️ **Pro Tip:** Don't enchant apples if you aren’t ready to spend all 30 levels!

![Enchanting Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb49ed8c48e3f7be089ad9151ed6678e87cd07f0.jpeg)

---
*"disenchant, dis-enchant or unenchant golden apple"*
## 🔥 Recovering XP

- You can **cook Enchanted Golden Apples** in a furnace to **recover the XP** spent during enchantment.
- **Do NOT use a Campfire** — it won’t return XP!


## 🍏 Shattered Golden Apple

- By cooking an **Enchanted Golden Apple**, you will obtain a new food item: **Shattered Golden Apple**.
- This unique food grants **Decaying Resistance   🛡️100%→0%**, but **does not heal** the player.

![Shattered Golden Apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/488212db9c5ec07f6549918f174430335df98656.png)

## 🪄***Mysterious sound and particle effects.***

![aste doing the thing](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c318b2bce838eb8d403943caad4f51cf51ebb43b.jpeg)
